items.title: platform onboarding release
items.description: Release of onboarding improvements covering developer portal and service catalog, golden path templates, and developer experience and workflow telemetry across Developer Portal, Platform Self-Service API, and Developer Platform CLI.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve onboarding time through clearer templates, ownership defaults, and self-service guidance.
Improve self-service completion rate by making onboarding actions easier to discover and finish.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve adoption by increasing confidence in the platform onboarding flow.
Reduce onboarding support demand through better default flows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve the percentage of routine onboarding and setup tasks engineers finish without platform intervention.
Improve confidence that the portal and templates are useful for daily engineering work.

businessKPIs.kpi: Platform support load per active team

productBricks.change: Released improved service discovery, ownership metadata, and self-service actions.
Released first-party templates for the most common service archetypes.
Released onboarding and self-service telemetry dashboards.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed onboarding improvements in Developer Portal.
Deployed onboarding workflow actions in Platform Self-Service API.
Deployed local setup and diagnostics support in Developer Platform CLI.

items.title: runtime self-service release
items.description: Release of runtime self-service improvements covering environment provisioning and ephemeral environments, delivery pipelines and release automation, and runtime connectivity and integration patterns across Runtime Provisioning API and CI/CD Pipeline Library.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time from repo creation to first production deployment
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve time to first production deployment through reusable runtime and pipeline patterns.
Improve maintainability by shifting teams onto common delivery and runtime paths.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve lead time by reducing delivery setup variance.
Improve provisioning turnaround through standardized workflows.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time from repo creation to first production deployment
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve speed of everyday delivery through reusable runtime and release workflows.
Improve turnaround for common preview and test environment requests.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve throughput by lowering waiting and setup variance.

productBricks.change: Released self-service provisioning and ephemeral environment workflows.
Released standard promotion, rollback, and release evidence workflows.
Released runtime connectivity and dependency access reference patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed runtime provisioning improvements in Runtime Provisioning API.
Deployed reusable rollout workflows in CI/CD Pipeline Library.

items.title: platform controls release
items.description: Release of platform-control improvements covering identity, secrets and access guardrails, policy as code and compliance controls, artifact supply chain and base images, observability and telemetry foundation, and reliability workflows and incident automation across Policy and Identity Control API, Security and Compliance Posture Dashboard, Platform Operations Dashboard, and Incident and Telemetry Event Streams.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve baseline control coverage by baking identity, policy, and trusted artifacts into the normal path.

customerKPIs.kpi: Incident MTTR for common platform failure classes
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve MTTR through standard telemetry, routing, and response automation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce manual review overhead by replacing repetitive governance work with policy automation.
Improve stability by strengthening delivery and runtime defaults.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve the ability to pass common policy and identity requirements through the normal workflow.
Improve clarity and trust in control-related feedback and remediation guidance.

businessKPIs.kpi: Platform support load per active team
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce exception and compliance support demand from everyday engineering work.

productBricks.change: Released stronger workload identity and secret-management defaults.
Released policy bundles, control evidence, and exception expiry workflows.
Released trusted base-image and artifact provenance improvements.
Released standard telemetry bundles and shared platform dashboards.
Released incident-routing and remediation automation improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed control-plane improvements in Policy and Identity Control API.
Deployed posture improvements in Security and Compliance Posture Dashboard.
Deployed reliability improvements in Platform Operations Dashboard.
Deployed operational event improvements in Incident and Telemetry Event Streams.
